description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence with two wide swinging gates and a central overhead structure resembling a small roofed archway. The fence panels are constructed from vertical wooden planks, each showing natural grain and weathering, and are supported by sturdy wooden posts. The central archway features a pitched roof made of overlapping wooden shingles, providing a sheltered entry point. The gates are attached to the posts with visible hinges, allowing them to swing open and closed. The overall design is utilitarian with a touch of traditional craftsmanship, suitable for marking boundaries or entrances in parks, gardens, or residential areas. There are no visible decorative elements, and the structure appears robust and functional.
description: A rustic wooden fence with two swinging gates and a central roofed archway, made from weathered vertical planks and sturdy posts. The design is functional and traditional, suitable for entrances or boundaries.
description_view_0: Front view showing both open gates and the central roofed archway, highlighting the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thickness of the roofed archway and the narrow profile of the fence panels.
description_view_2: Rear view of the fence, displaying the back of the gates and the underside of the roofed archway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the archway and fence panels.
attribute_top_design_pattern: pitched roof over archway, flat on gates
